name: WayForward
description: American developer known for Shantae, licensed action games, and modern retro-styled platformers.

eras.title: Licensed and Handheld Era
eras.description: WayForward builds its reputation through handheld development, licensed games, and the original Shantae.

eras.title: Modern Retro Era
eras.description: The studio becomes closely associated with Shantae sequels and retro-styled action games.
